meta.title: ¡Hola! - Greetings
meta.subtitle: Learn to greet people in Spanish

learningOutcomes: Say hello and goodbye in Spanish
Greet people at different times of day

steps.title: Welcome to Spanish!
steps.body: Spanish is spoken by over 500 million people worldwide. Let's start with the most essential skill - saying hello! 🌍

steps.title: ¡Hola!
steps.body:
The most universal Spanish greeting is **hola** (hello). You can use it anytime, anywhere, with anyone!

Pronunciation tip: The 'h' is silent in Spanish, so it sounds like 'OH-lah'.

steps.title: Time of Day Greetings
steps.body:
Spanish has specific greetings for different times:

• **Buenos días** - Good morning (until noon)
• **Buenas tardes** - Good afternoon (noon to sunset)
• **Buenas noches** - Good evening/night
steps.audioPhrase: Buenos días. Buenas tardes. Buenas noches.

steps.title: ¿Cómo estás?
steps.body:
To ask 'How are you?' in casual conversation:

**¿Cómo estás?** - How are you? (informal)
**¿Cómo está usted?** - How are you? (formal)

steps.title: Common Responses
steps.body:
When someone asks how you are:

• **Bien, gracias** - Good, thanks
• **Muy bien** - Very good
• **Más o menos** - So-so
• **Mal** - Bad
steps.audioPhrase: Bien, gracias. Muy bien. Más o menos. Mal.

steps.title: Saying Goodbye
steps.body:
To say goodbye:

• **Adiós** - Goodbye
• **Hasta luego** - See you later
• **Hasta mañana** - See you tomorrow
• **Chao** - Bye (casual, from Italian 'ciao')
steps.audioPhrase: Adiós. Hasta luego. Hasta mañana. Chao.

steps.title: Quick Check
steps.body:
You've learned:
✓ How to say hello (Hola)
✓ Time-based greetings
✓ How to ask and answer 'How are you?'
✓ How to say goodbye

steps.title: 🎉 ¡Excelente!
steps.body:
You just completed your first Spanish lesson! You can now greet anyone in Spanish. Keep practicing these phrases - you'll use them every day! 🌟

**Pro tip:** Try greeting people in Spanish today!
